DisplayName: ADP -> People and Culture > Compensation & Benefits (Canada)
Comment: MBST, ADP: This is our payroll system, and it is also our HRIS for the US and Canada. We have two versions of ADP – one for Canada and one for the United States. The one in Canada is called TeamPay. The one in US is called Workforce Now. In the US, we use ADP to administer our health and welfare benefits, they manage our 401K (pension plan), they are our employee data repository, they support with payroll taxes, time-off accruals and time-off balances, wage garnishments, payroll, and payroll reporting, etc. They are our resource for all things HR and Payroll as far as tools are concerned. The TeamPay version of ADP is used for payroll and reporting for our Canadian employees.
